summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite and AI/ML research for price prediction. Continued development across hardware emulation firmware, Windows Explorer utilities, and an on-device LLM assistant for Android.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built and tested a kernel-level input filtering and injection driver for Windows.

items.title: Android TTS engine
items.description: Started a new Android text-to-speech engine project with multiple voice engines.

items.title: E-ink device firmware
items.description: Expanded custom firmware for an e-ink device with a knowledge base app and reader improvements.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Iterated on the trading platform's infrastructure, billing model, and user onboarding flows.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Developed a new firmware variant for the mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: Windows Explorer tagging utility
items.description: Polished the file and folder tagging utility for Windows Explorer.

items.title: Computer vision aim assist
items.description: Worked on a personal project involving screen capture and input emulation.

items.title: E-ink reader firmware
items.description: Enhanced custom firmware for an e-ink reader with map and knowledge base applications.

items.title: Clash proxy client
items.description: Updated a proxy client application with new transport support.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted machine learning experiments on a crypto price prediction model.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant
items.description: Built an Android chat assistant with local LLM capabilities and tool use.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher
items.description: Developed a minimal Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink devices.

items.title: Windows Explorer tagging utility
items.description: Worked on CI/CD pipelines and store publishing for the file tagging utility.

items.title: n8n Telegram node
items.description: Maintained a forked Telegram integration node for n8n automation.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Developed a graph-powered code analysis tool with multi-language support.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE setup and configuration.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimal, fast labeling tool for personal computer vision projects.

items.title: Poker CV analysis tool
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games.

items.title: Claude Code n8n node
items.description: Updated an n8n integration node for an AI coding agent.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Began a full rewrite of the trading platform with a new architecture.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Iterated through multiple hardware revisions of the mouse and keyboard emulation firmware.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built a tool for autonomous multi-session AI-assisted coding workflows.
